# Lessons Learned

Project-wide lessons promoted from completed workflow tickets.

Keep this file small and durable:

- Add only lessons that apply beyond one ticket.
- Prefer rules that change future implementation or review behavior.
- Include a short source note, such as the originating ticket or PR.

## Template

```md
## Short Lesson Title (PROJECT-123)

What was learned and why it matters.

Rule: The concrete behavior future agents/developers should follow.
```
